title: Signed: Lykke Li Throws an ‘Afterparty’ With Neon Gold; Victoria Monét Inks With UTA
summary: Other recent artist signings include Loud Luxury, Josiah and the Bonnevilles and Rebounder.
body: Swedish singer-songwriter Lykke Li signed with Neon Gold Records/Futures for the release of her sixth studio album, The Afterparty , which is set for release on May 8. The first single from the album, “Lucky Again,” dropped on Feb. 12. “I was twirling around in love addiction for [my previous] albums,” said Lykke Li in a statement on The Afterparty . “Now I’m going into my existential era.” She added, “I find that we’re in an era where everyone is talking about, ‘My higher self’, F–k that. This is an album dealing with your lower self: your need for revenge, your shame, despair, all of it.” Related Sublime Signs With Atlantic Records Following Record-Breaking Alternative Airplay Run Jessica Lynch According to a press release, The Afterparty was written in Los Angeles and recorded in Stockholm with “a 17-piece string orchestra, maximalist arrangements, ‘apocalyptic bongos,’ and a whole lot of flute.” Of “Lucky Again,” Li said, “To me it’s samsara in a song. The wheel of life; winning, losing, living, dying. Having had something and praying you’ll have it again. Whether it’s sex, money, vitality, love. I al…

title: Salt Bread Is Ready to Win Over the World
summary: The range of flavors and fillings of salt bread have diversified as it has become a global hit | Tano Justin’s Salt Bread, a new bakery in New York City, serves only one food item. Its namesake pastry is a golden-brown horn, glossy-topped and with a glitter of salt. It tears apart to expose not the…
